entries.title: ECB's Lagarde flags euro-denominated stablecoins as financial stability risk, diverging from Bundesbank stance
entries.snippet: The ECB President argued that euro-denominated stablecoins risk financial stability and monetary policy, pushing for a digital euro instead.

entries.title: AUSTRAC Launches Supervision Campaigns as Australia's Crypto Regulatory Reforms Kick In
entries.snippet: The campaigns target over-the-counter operators and local exchanges as new laws expand oversight to custody and brokerage services.

entries.title: Solv Protocol drops LayerZero in favor of Chainlink for $700 million tokenized bitcoin
entries.snippet: It cited security as the core reason for the migration, in an apparent response to the recent exploit of LayerZero-powered Kelp DAO.

entries.title: Coinbase and AWS launch USDC payment rails for AI agents
entries.snippet: The integration allows AI agents built on Amazon Bedrock AgentCore to make USDC micropayments and access services autonomously using Coinbase’s x402 protocol.
entries.tweet_text: @coinbase and AWS launch USDC payment rails for AI agents

entries.title: AWS unveils AI agent payments based on stablecoins
entries.snippet: Amazon Web Services (AWS) has introduced one of the first end-to-end payment systems for AI agents, built in collaboration with Coinbase and Stripe. The new service, Amazon Bedrock AgentCore payments, enables AI agents to make micropayments to pay for API usage, web content or to pay other agents. T
entries.tweet_text: AWS unveils AI agent payments based on stablecoins

entries.title: Amazon Teams With Coinbase and Stripe to Let AI Agents Pay With Stablecoins
entries.snippet: The new Amazon Web Services system lets AI agents use the USDC stablecoin to pay for APIs, data, and online services.
entries.tweet_text: Amazon Teams With @coinbase and Stripe to Let AI Agents Pay With Stablecoins

entries.title: Bitwise to take over Superstate's $267 million tokenized Crypto Carry Fund
entries.snippet: USCC will be renamed the Bitwise Crypto Carry Fund while keeping the same ticker, smart contracts, and token address.

entries.title: Kraken to buy stablecoin payments firm Reap in $600 million deal
entries.snippet: Kraken to buy stablecoin payments firm Reap in $600 million deal: Bloomberg CoinDesk
entries.tweet_text: @kaboracle to buy stablecoin payments firm Reap in $600 million deal

entries.title: Morning Minute: Morgan Stanley Is Coming for Coinbase
entries.snippet: Morgan Stanley just launched crypto trading on ETrade, while the White House wants the Clarity Act signed by July 4.
entries.tweet_text: Morning Minute: Morgan Stanley Is Coming for @coinbase

entries.title: Mysten Labs' Abiodun says Sui processed over $1 trillion in stablecoin volume since August as it eyes free, private payments
entries.snippet: Sui processed over $1 trillion in stablecoin volume since August as Mysten Labs' Abiodun eyes a zero-fee and private payments rollout.

entries.title: Pantera says $321 billion tokenization market remains in 'newspaper-on-a-website' phase despite 60% growth
entries.snippet: Pantera said that the $321 billion tokenization market is still in a "newspaper-on-a-website" phase, with 77.6% of assets still just wrappers.

entries.title: BNY expands crypto custody push in Abu Dhabi
entries.snippet: BNY announced Thursday that it is expanding its crypto custody business to the UAE through partnerships with Finstreet and ADI Foundation.

entries.title: Samsung SDS wins deal to build South Korea's blockchain securities system
entries.snippet: The Korea Securities Depository platform is expected to launch by February 2027, aligning with South Korea’s incoming security token regulations.
entries.tweet_text: Samsung SDS wins deal to build South Korea's blockchain securities system

entries.title: Bithumb enters Vietnam crypto license race with SSI Digital deal
entries.snippet: Bithumb’s tie-up with SSI Digital positions it for Vietnam’s strict crypto exchange pilot as competition for scarce licenses heats up and scrutiny mounts at home.

entries.title: Stablecoin adoption to scale on back of 'very large' tech firms: Bitwise
entries.snippet: Bitwise investment chief Matt Hougan says projections tipping stablecoins to hit $4 trillion in value by 2030 could happen if major tech firms continue to adopt them.

entries.title: Coinbase Adds Gold and Silver Perps With USDC Settlement and up to 25x Leverage
entries.snippet: Coinbase Adds Gold and Silver Perps With USDC Settlement and up to 25x Leverage Bitcoin News

entries.title: Blockchain Pilot Unlocks 24/7 Treasury Liquidity
entries.snippet: A near real-time cross-border, cross-bank redemption of a tokenized U.S. Treasury fund was successfully completed in a pilot conducted by Ondo Finance, Kinexys by J.P. Morgan, Mastercard and Ripple. The achievement demonstrates coordination between public blockchain infrastructure and interbank sett
entries.tweet_text: Blockchain Pilot Unlocks 24/7 Treasury Liquidity

entries.title: Bittrex Wants Its $24 Million Settlement Back, Now That the SEC Is Pro-Crypto
entries.snippet: Now-shuttered crypto exchange Bittrex settled with the SEC back in 2023 after being accused of offering illegally unregistered securities.

entries.title: SIX gets approval to merge SDX DLT CSD into securities services, adds crypto custody
entries.snippet: SIX has received approval from Swiss regulator FINMA to merge its blockchain entity SIX Digital Exchange AG (SDX) into its central securities depository SIX SIS AG. SDX previously operated as a separate licensed entity with its own CSD license for digital assets. Separately, FINMA also approved the
entries.tweet_text: SIX gets approval to merge SDX DLT CSD into securities services, adds crypto custody

entries.title: Ripple, JPMorgan and others use XRP Ledger to settle tokenized Treasurys fund internationally
entries.snippet: The transaction represents an example of crypto firms and Wall Street institutions jointly exploring 24/7 settlement systems.
entries.tweet_text: @Ripple, JPMorgan and others use XRP Ledger to settle tokenized Treasurys fund internationally

entries.title: Morgan Stanley takes on crypto trading rivals with E*Trade pilot
entries.snippet: The Wall Street bank is charging 50 basis points per crypto trade, below basic retail pricing at Coinbase, Robinhood and Charles Schwab.
entries.tweet_text: @MorganStanley takes on crypto trading rivals with E*Trade pilot

entries.title: OpenTrade raises $17 million to connect stablecoins to real-world assets
Bitcoin hits longest negative funding streak this decade as K33 flags short squeeze risk
entries.snippet: Buying bitcoin during such negative funding regimes has consistently led to strong forward returns, Head of Research Vetle Lunde said.

entries.title: OpenTrade raises $17M to expand stablecoin yield infrastructure after topping $200M TVL
entries.snippet: OpenTrade raises $17 million as the stablecoin platform tops $200 million in TVL and expands infrastructure targeting neobanks and fintechs.

entries.title: Stablecoin industry opposes Bank of England's unhosted wallet ban
entries.snippet: The crypto industry in the UK has come out against the Bank of England’s proposed policy that would ban custodial wallets for stablecoins.

entries.title: Blockchain.com launches SnapMarkets as prediction markets move into faster crypto bets
Bitwise CIO says big tech stablecoin tests could help drive $4 trillion supply by 2030
entries.snippet: Matt Hougan said tech firms like DoorDash and Meta exploring stablecoin payouts could help drive projections of $4 trillion in supply by 2030.

entries.title: World's first live map of token concentration: InsightX launches Atlas Live
entries.snippet: A new era of on-chain trading transparency. Atlas Live enables traders to analyze token concentration and spot potential rug pulls. Now in real time.

entries.title: Crypto custodian Taurus moves straight into EU capital markets with MiFID license in Cyprus

entries.snippet: Anchorage’s new product enables AI agents to have compliant access to capital across traditional finance and crypto payment rails.

entries.title: Ripple CEO says market structure bill not a 'done deal,' despite stablecoin compromise
entries.snippet: Brad Garlinghouse addressed attendees at a Tuesday crypto conference on the progress of the CLARITY Act after US lawmakers announced a compromise on stablecoin yield that could advance the legislation.

entries.title: SoFi to launch its stablecoin on Solana, citing speed and cost
entries.snippet: SoFiUSD is a fully reserved U.S. dollar stablecoin issued by SoFi Bank, a nationally chartered bank.
entries.tweet_text: @SoFi to launch its stablecoin on Solana, citing speed and cost

entries.title: Kraken partners with MoneyGram for global crypto cash-outs
entries.snippet: The partnership enabling conversion of digital assets into cash through MoneyGram’s global network follows a similar move by rival Western Union.

entries.title: Europe should weigh tokenized SEPA payments, Bank of Italy official says
entries.snippet: The Bank of Italy’s deputy governor floated the evaluation of tokenized SEPA payments, as the ECB experiments with tokenized digital payment frameworks to avoid stablecoin competition.

entries.title: Bullish to acquire Equiniti in $4.2 billion deal combining transfer agent and tokenization stack
entries.snippet: Bullish agreed to acquire Equiniti in a $4.2 billion deal combining its tokenization stack with the global transfer agent’s infrastructure.

entries.title: UAE free zone launches blockchain-based business IDs for registered firms
entries.snippet: Innovation City launches a blockchain-based business ID system, giving more than 1,000 firms verifiable onchain credentials for identity and access.

entries.title: DTCC eyes October tokenized securities launch with 50 DeFi and TradFi giants
entries.snippet: With $114 trillion in custodied liquid assets, Depository Trust & Clearing Corporation looks to position tokenization as future of existing financial system.
entries.tweet_text: DTCC eyes October tokenized securities launch with 50 DeFi and TradFi giants

entries.title: DTCC shares tokenization launch date. 50 firms join Industry Working Group
entries.snippet: The Depository Trust & Clearing Corporation (DTCC) has announced the launch timescale for its tokenization solution, with limited live transactions from July 2026 and a launch in October. The systemically important market infrastructure received a no action letter from the SEC in December 2025 allow
entries.tweet_text: DTCC shares tokenization launch date. 50 firms join Industry Working Group

entries.title: Banks Stay Tight-Lipped as Senators Reveal Proposed Clarity Act Stablecoin Deal
entries.snippet: Senators unveiled a Clarity Act compromise on the subject of stablecoin rewards. Crypto seems happy enough, but what about the banks?

entries.title: DTCC Reveals Launch Plans for Tokenization Service With Wall Street Giants Onboard
entries.snippet: DTCC, the infrastructure giant managing $114 trillion in securities, will begin tokenizing Russell 1000 stocks and Treasuries.

entries.snippet: Securitize is the first firm to receive FINRA approval to custody tokenized securities and underwrite onchain IPOs and secondary offerings.

entries.title: Brazil Outlaws Crypto Remittances From FX Companies
entries.snippet: Brazil has forbidden electronic foreign exchange (eFX) companies from using cryptocurrencies to settle overseas remittances. entries.title: New York AG settles for $5 million with Uphold in first enforcement action against a crypto yield product promoter
entries.snippet: The settlement is the first New York enforcement action to target a platform that promoted someone else's crypto yield product rather than its own issuer.

entries.title: BlackRock urges OCC to drop tokenized reserve cap idea, expand eligible assets in GENIUS Act comment letter
entries.snippet: The world's largest asset manager opposed a potential 20% cap on tokenized reserve assets, a constraint that would limit products like its BUIDL fund.

entries.title: Crypto Biz: Capital has no consensus
entries.snippet: Crypto markets splinter as miners pivot to AI, BitMine doubles down on ETH, stablecoin liquidity idles, and tokenized Treasurys reshape trading collateral.

entries.title: Crypto onramping solution Fun raises $72 million Series A co-led by Multicoin Capital and SignalFire
entries.snippet: Fun powers deposits, withdrawals, and settlement flows for some of crypto’s leading apps, including Polymarket, Lighter, and Aave.

entries.title: Tether Reports Billion-Dollar Q1 Profit Amid Crypto Slump—And Says Audit Has Begun
entries.snippet: Stablecoin giant Tether says it holds over $141 billion in U.S. Treasuries, a figure that has never been verified by a full audit.
